vendor_context: Anker competitor (portable power stations, solar generators, home backup power)
status: ACTIVE — Global DTC brand; dominant in portable power station / solar generator category

networks.name: Awin
networks.notes: Primary global affiliate network. Multi-market: US, CA, AU, UK, EU (DE, FR, ES, IT), ZA. Program profile at ui.awin.com/merchant-profile/59181. Full toolset expected (banners, datafeeds, deep links). AOV listed as $1,500+ on Awin profile.

networks.name: CJ (Commission Junction)
networks.status: ACTIVE — NEW network confirmed 2026-05-01; multi-region rollout
networks.commission_rate: unknown (likely 5% to match Awin; unconfirmed from search data)
networks.notes: NEW as of this audit (2026-05-01). EcoFlow has launched a full multi-region CJ program covering US, AU, ZA, CA, EU (DE/FR/ES/IT), and UK — 30-day cookie confirmed for UK program. This is a SECOND major managed network alongside Awin, significantly expanding affiliate reach. EcoFlow affiliates can now join via CJ without needing Awin signup. First confirmed via search index on 2026-05-01.

networks.name: Commission Factory
networks.notes: Listed on Commission Factory for AU and ROW markets. May overlap with CJ AU/ZA coverage now that CJ has been expanded. Status may evolve as CJ rollout matures.

networks.name: Direct (EcoFlow.com)
networks.notes: EcoFlow runs a direct program at us.ecoflow.com/pages/affiliate-program. Up to 5% per qualifying sale (search snippet updated from 'minimum 5%' to 'up to 5%' — minor wording shift, rate unchanged). 7-day cookie (shorter than Awin/CJ 30-day). EU direct also active at eu.ecoflow.com/pages/affiliate-program (minimum 5%). Apply direct; approval within 2-3 business days.

networks.name: CueLinks
networks.notes: Aggregator listing. Lower rate (3.15%) vs direct/Awin/CJ (5%) — standard aggregator haircut.

affiliate_program.commission_summary: 5% on all sales via Awin/CJ/Direct; 3.15% via aggregators
affiliate_program.cookie_note: 30 days via Awin and CJ; only 7 days via direct program — affiliates should join via Awin or CJ for best attribution
affiliate_program.aov_note: US direct page states 'over $1,000' AOV. Awin lists $1,500+. Using conservative $1,000 floor.
affiliate_program.contact_note: US/global program contact. ROW contact may be row.affiliate@ecoflow.com (confirmed on Commission Factory listing).
prohibited_promotions: PPC / SEM on brand terms (search engine placement)

home_upgrade_program.status: CAMPAIGN COMPLETED — ran March 31 to April 28, 2026
home_upgrade_program.mechanics: EcoCredits incentive system — earned by adopting EcoFlow products, completing community activities, and contributing to Forum discussions. Users donated EcoCredits which were collectively converted to donations.
home_upgrade_program.redemption: EcoCredits redeemable for exclusive product discounts OR converted to financial contributions to non-profit partners
home_upgrade_program.ongoing_program: Home Upgrade Program as a standing initiative appears ongoing; the April 8–28 campaign was the first activation. EcoCredits system and forum community layer remain active.
home_upgrade_program.significance: HIGH — First successful community fundraising activation: 945 customers, $50K raised in 28 days. Confirms EcoFlow's community/creator loyalty layer is gaining traction and is now proven. Blurs line between customer advocacy and affiliate marketing.
home_upgrade_program.competitive_threat: EcoFlow is recruiting the exact same creator/content audience Anker SOLIX needs. Proven community engagement ($50K raised) + now dual-network affiliate (Awin + CJ) = significant gap vs Anker's Amazon-only model.

company_status.financial: STABLE — Private, China-headquartered; strong global revenue, no distress signals
company_status.positioning: Market leader in portable power stations and solar generators. Positioned premium vs Jackery, direct competitor to Anker SOLIX line.
company_status.tech_partnerships: CES 2026: EcoFlow + Homey by LG partnership for whole-home energy management integration. API-sharing and two-way integrations across partner ecosystem.

competitive_intel.commission_vs_anker: EcoFlow 5% (Awin + CJ) vs Anker Amazon Associates ~1-4% — EcoFlow's managed programs significantly outpace Anker's Amazon-dependent model.
competitive_intel.cookie_advantage: EcoFlow Awin/CJ: 30-day cookie. Anker mostly via Amazon (24-hour cookie). EcoFlow wins attribution window decisively.
competitive_intel.aov_advantage: EcoFlow AOV $1,000+ vs Anker average order ~$30-60. At 5%, EcoFlow yields ~$50+/sale avg. Anker at 3% on $50 = $1.50. EcoFlow is ~33x better payout per sale.
competitive_intel.network_expansion_2026q2: EcoFlow now active on BOTH Awin AND CJ — dual-network strategy massively expands affiliable publisher pool. Affiliates who prefer CJ over Awin can now join. This reduces friction to partnership. Anker has no managed affiliate network.
competitive_intel.community_moat_proven: Home Upgrade Program campaign (March 31–April 28) delivered $50K raised / 945 participants in 28 days. This is not a pilot — it's a proven loyalty activation engine. EcoCredits system creates social + financial lock-in for creators.
competitive_intel.affiliate_risk: LOW — Core program stable (Awin 5%, 30-day unchanged). CJ expansion adds reach. Community moat strengthening.
competitive_intel.affiliate_mindshare: EcoFlow now running FOUR affiliate/creator acquisition channels: (1) Awin managed network, (2) CJ managed network (NEW), (3) Direct program (us.ecoflow.com), (4) Home Upgrade Program / EcoCredits community. Anker has at best one (Amazon Associates).
competitive_intel.opportunity_for_anker: Anker SOLIX must (1) launch managed affiliate program on Awin/Impact/CJ at 5%+ with 30-day cookie AND (2) develop community/creator loyalty layer to compete with EcoCredits. Current Amazon-centric model loses in every metric. EcoFlow's dual-network + community strategy is now entrenched.

history.event: First audit. Confirmed Awin as primary global network at 5% commission, 30-day cookie, $1,500+ AOV. Direct program at EcoFlow.com also active (5% min, 7-day cookie). Commission Factory active for AU/ROW. CueLinks aggregator listing at 3.15%. Company stable, global expansion ongoing.

Second audit. Core affiliate terms UNCHANGED (5% Awin, 30-day cookie; 5% direct, 7-day cookie). NOTABLE: Home Upgrade Program launched 2026-03-31 — new EcoCredits community/creator incentive system hosted on EcoFlow Forum. Non-profit partners: Footprint Project, Convoy of Hope. Home Improvement deals campaign active April 8-28. Contact email confirmed as affiliate@ecoflow.com on US program page.
history.change_detail: Home Upgrade Program + EcoCredits launched 2026-03-31 — community/creator loyalty layer on top of existing affiliate program

history.event: Third audit. TWO CHANGES DETECTED: (1) CJ (Commission Junction) confirmed as NEW affiliate network — full multi-region rollout: US/AU/ZA (5815804), CA (6175965), EU/DE/FR/ES/IT (6123342), UK (6175973). 30-day cookie confirmed. This is EcoFlow's second major managed network alongside Awin. Significantly expands publisher reach. (2) Home Upgrade Program campaign CONCLUDED April 28, 2026 — raised $50,000 from 945 participants in 28 days. Funds went to Footprint Project and Convoy of Hope. Proves community activation model at scale. Ongoing Home Upgrade Program and EcoCredits system remain active. Core Awin terms unchanged: 5%, 30-day cookie.
history.change_detail: CJ affiliate network added (multi-region: US/AU/ZA/CA/EU/UK); Home Upgrade Program campaign concluded with $50K raised from 945 customers (Apr 28)
